2605.08324.title: FQPDR: Federated Quantum Neural Network for Privacy-preserving Early Detection of Diabetic Retinopathy
2605.08324.paper_summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a common complication of diabetes that can lead to blindness of people. Detecting DR at the earliest stage is essential to prevent irreversible eye damage. Microaneurysm dots are the first signs of DR. As the dots are tiny and of low contrast, detecting mild DR is a very challenging task. Federated learning (FL) preserves data privacy, which is a major concern for medical image processing. FL is a collaborative learning method, which shares only the model parameters with a server, without sharing the patient data to a central server. Inspired by classical FL, we propose a federated learning-based quantum neural network (federated QNN) for this task. We implemented the models with limited samples and few learnable parameters from the E-ophtha and Retina MNIST datasets. The crossevaluation efficiency of the proposed federated quantum neural network system for privacy-preserving early detection of diabetic retinopathy (FQPDR) in Kaggle dataset images indicates the robustness of the light weight learning models. FQPDR performances are inspiring while considering existing non-FL and FL methods.
2605.08324.paper_summary_zh: 糖尿病視網膜病變（DR）是糖尿病的一種常見併發症，可能導致人們失明。<lb/>在最早的階段檢測DR對於防止不可逆的眼部損傷至關重要。<lb/>微動脈瘤點是DR的第一個跡象。<lb/>由於這些點很小且對比度低，檢測輕度DR是一項非常具有挑戰性的任務。<lb/>聯邦學習（FL）保護數據隱私，這是醫學影像處理的一個主要關注點。<lb/>FL是一種協作學習方法，只與伺服器共享模型參數，而不將患者數據共享到中央伺服器。<lb/>受到經典FL的啟發，我們提出了一種基於聯邦學習的量子神經網絡（聯邦QNN）來處理這一任務。<lb/>我們在E-ophtha和Retina MNIST數據集上實現了有限樣本和少量可學習參數的模型。<lb/>所提出的聯邦量子神經網絡系統在Kaggle數據集圖像中進行隱私保護的糖尿病視網膜病變早期檢測（FQPDR）的交叉評估效率表明了輕量級學習模型的穩健性。<lb/>考慮到現有的非FL和FL方法，FQPDR的表現令人鼓舞。
2605.08324.author: Debashis De et.al.
2605.08324.authors: Debashis De, Mahua Nandy Pal, Dipankar Hazra
